applications.description: A small test repo for renderer iteration.

features.name: Agent instruction file
features.description: A dedicated file telling agents how to work in this repo.

features.name: AI IDE configuration
features.description: Settings or rules for AI-powered editors/IDEs.

features.name: Linter
features.description: Static analysis catching bugs and style issues.

features.name: CI pipeline
features.description: Automated checks on every push or PR.
features.rationale: No .github/workflows/ or .gitlab-ci.yml found. Fresh PRs run zero automated checks.
features.remediation_prompt:
[Readiness Fix] test-repo CI Pipeline

Fix the failing signal: CI Pipeline ([0/1])

Add a GitHub Actions workflow at .github/workflows/ci.yml that runs lint + tests on push and PR. The workflow should run on the same Node version used in package.json, install via the locked manifest, and fail on any lint or test error.

## CRITICAL: Quality Standards

Your fix must genuinely improve the codebase. NO disabling checks or skip markers to pass validation.

features.name: Issue templates
features.description: Structured templates for bug reports, feature requests.

features.name: LICENSE file
features.description: Repository has a LICENSE file at root.

features.name: Error tracking
features.description: Errors captured and reported in production.
features.remediation_prompt:
[Readiness Fix] test-repo Error Tracking

Fix the failing signal: Error Tracking ([0/1])

Integrate an error tracking service (Sentry recommended). Add the SDK to deps, initialize it in your app entrypoint, and route errors to a project you own. Configure source maps so stack traces resolve.

## CRITICAL: Quality Standards

NO empty placeholder integrations -- DSN must be real and errors must actually flow.

features.name: Tool allowlist
features.description: Repo-checked allowlist of which agent tools may run.
features.rationale: No .factory/settings.json with commandAllowlist; .claude/settings.json missing the permissions block.
features.remediation_prompt:
[Readiness Fix] test-repo Tool Allowlist

Fix the failing signal: Tool Allowlist ([0/1])

Create .claude/settings.json (committed) with a permissions block defining allow/ask/deny lists tuned to this repo's actual build commands.

## CRITICAL: Quality Standards

NO trivial {} files. The allowlist must reflect the real workflow.

top_actions.title: Add a CI pipeline
top_actions.body: Set up GitHub Actions to run lint and tests on every push. Closes feature #30 (L2) and reduces the risk of regressions landing on main.

top_actions.title: Wire up error tracking
top_actions.body: Integrate Sentry (or equivalent) so production exceptions are captured. Closes feature #115 (L3).

top_actions.title: Define an agent tool allowlist
top_actions.body: Add a permissions block to .claude/settings.json so agents have a clear contract for what they can run. Closes feature #121 (L4).
